# Sandchest API

> Expanded API reference for language models. Generated from the live OpenAPI 3.1 specification.

- Version: 0.1.0
- Base URL: https://api.sandchest.com
- OpenAPI: https://api.sandchest.com/openapi.json
- API reference: https://docs.sandchest.com/docs/api-reference

## Authentication

Use `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` on authenticated endpoints. Operations that set `security: []` in the OpenAPI spec are public.

## Health

Health and readiness probes

### GET /health

- Summary: Basic health check
- Operation ID: getHealth
- Authentication: None
- Parameters: none
- Request body: none
- Responses:
  - `200`: Server is healthy (application/json: HealthResponse)

### GET /healthz

- Summary: Basic health check (alias)
- Operation ID: getHealthz
- Authentication: None
- Parameters: none
- Request body: none
- Responses:
  - `200`: Server is healthy (application/json: HealthResponse)

### GET /readyz

- Summary: Readiness check
- Operation ID: getReadyz
- Authentication: None
- Description: Returns 503 if Redis is unavailable or server is draining connections.
- Parameters: none
- Request body: none
- Responses:
  - `200`: All subsystems ready (application/json: ReadyResponse)
  - `503`: One or more subsystems degraded (application/json: ReadyResponse)

## Sandboxes

Create, manage, fork, and stop sandboxes

### POST /v1/sandboxes

- Summary: Create a sandbox
- Operation ID: createSandbox
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Parameters: none
- Request body:
  - application/json: CreateSandboxRequest
- Responses:
  - `201`: Sandbox queued (application/json: CreateSandboxResponse)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `429`: Rate limited (application/json: ErrorResponse)

### GET /v1/sandboxes

- Summary: List sandboxes
- Operation ID: listSandboxes
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Parameters:
  - `status` (query, optional) - SandboxStatus.
  - `forked_from` (query, optional) - string. Filter by parent sandbox ID
  - `cursor` (query, optional) - string.
  - `limit` (query, optional) - integer.
- Request body: none
- Responses:
  - `200`: Sandbox list (application/json: ListSandboxesResponse)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)

### GET /v1/sandboxes/{id}

- Summary: Get sandbox details
- Operation ID: getSandbox
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Parameters:
  - `id` (path, required) - string. Sandbox ID (prefixed, e.g. `sb_...`)
- Request body: none
- Responses:
  - `200`: Sandbox details (application/json: Sandbox)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `404`: Resource not found (application/json: ErrorResponse)

### DELETE /v1/sandboxes/{id}

- Summary: Delete a sandbox
- Operation ID: deleteSandbox
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Parameters:
  - `id` (path, required) - string. Sandbox ID (prefixed, e.g. `sb_...`)
- Request body: none
- Responses:
  - `200`: Sandbox deleted (application/json: SandboxStatusResponse)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `404`: Resource not found (application/json: ErrorResponse)

### POST /v1/sandboxes/{id}/fork

- Summary: Fork a running sandbox
- Operation ID: forkSandbox
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Parameters:
  - `id` (path, required) - string. Sandbox ID (prefixed, e.g. `sb_...`)
- Request body:
  - application/json: ForkSandboxRequest
- Responses:
  - `201`: Fork created (application/json: ForkSandboxResponse)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `404`: Resource not found (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `409`: State conflict (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `422`: Fork depth or count limit exceeded (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `429`: Rate limited (application/json: ErrorResponse)

### GET /v1/sandboxes/{id}/forks

- Summary: Get fork tree
- Operation ID: getForkTree
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Parameters:
  - `id` (path, required) - string. Sandbox ID (prefixed, e.g. `sb_...`)
- Request body: none
- Responses:
  - `200`: Fork tree (application/json: ForkTreeResponse)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `404`: Resource not found (application/json: ErrorResponse)

### POST /v1/sandboxes/{id}/stop

- Summary: Stop a sandbox
- Operation ID: stopSandbox
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Parameters:
  - `id` (path, required) - string. Sandbox ID (prefixed, e.g. `sb_...`)
- Request body: none
- Responses:
  - `202`: Stop initiated (application/json: SandboxStatusResponse)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `404`: Resource not found (application/json: ErrorResponse)

### GET /v1/sandboxes/{id}/stream

- Summary: Stream sandbox events (SSE)
- Operation ID: streamSandboxEvents
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Parameters:
  - `id` (path, required) - string. Sandbox ID (prefixed, e.g. `sb_...`)
  - `Last-Event-ID` (header, optional) - string. Reconnect from this event ID
- Request body: none
- Responses:
  - `200`: SSE event stream (text/event-stream: string)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `404`: Resource not found (application/json: ErrorResponse)

## Exec

Execute commands in sandboxes

### POST /v1/sandboxes/{id}/exec

- Summary: Execute a command
- Operation ID: execCommand
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Description: Runs a command in the sandbox. Set `wait: false` for async execution.
- Parameters:
  - `id` (path, required) - string. Sandbox ID (prefixed, e.g. `sb_...`)
- Request body:
  - application/json: ExecRequest
- Responses:
  - `200`: Sync result (application/json: ExecSyncResponse)
  - `202`: Async exec accepted (application/json: ExecAsyncResponse)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `404`: Resource not found (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `409`: State conflict (application/json: ErrorResponse)

### GET /v1/sandboxes/{id}/exec/{execId}

- Summary: Get exec status
- Operation ID: getExec
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Parameters:
  - `id` (path, required) - string. Sandbox ID (prefixed, e.g. `sb_...`)
  - `execId` (path, required) - string. Exec ID (prefixed, e.g. `ex_...`)
- Request body: none
- Responses:
  - `200`: Exec details (application/json: ExecDetail)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `404`: Resource not found (application/json: ErrorResponse)

### GET /v1/sandboxes/{id}/execs

- Summary: List execs
- Operation ID: listExecs
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Parameters:
  - `id` (path, required) - string. Sandbox ID (prefixed, e.g. `sb_...`)
  - `status` (query, optional) - ExecStatus.
  - `session_id` (query, optional) - string.
  - `cursor` (query, optional) - string.
  - `limit` (query, optional) - integer.
- Request body: none
- Responses:
  - `200`: Exec list (application/json: ListExecsResponse)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `404`: Resource not found (application/json: ErrorResponse)

### GET /v1/sandboxes/{id}/exec/{execId}/stream

- Summary: Stream exec output (SSE)
- Operation ID: streamExecOutput
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Parameters:
  - `id` (path, required) - string. Sandbox ID (prefixed, e.g. `sb_...`)
  - `execId` (path, required) - string. Exec ID (prefixed, e.g. `ex_...`)
  - `Last-Event-ID` (header, optional) - string. Reconnect from this event ID
- Request body: none
- Responses:
  - `200`: SSE event stream (text/event-stream: string)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `404`: Resource not found (application/json: ErrorResponse)

## Sessions

Interactive terminal sessions

### POST /v1/sandboxes/{id}/sessions

- Summary: Create an interactive session
- Operation ID: createSession
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Parameters:
  - `id` (path, required) - string. Sandbox ID (prefixed, e.g. `sb_...`)
- Request body:
  - application/json: CreateSessionRequest
- Responses:
  - `201`: Session created (application/json: CreateSessionResponse)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `404`: Resource not found (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `409`: State conflict (application/json: ErrorResponse)

### GET /v1/sandboxes/{id}/sessions

- Summary: List sessions
- Operation ID: listSessions
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Parameters:
  - `id` (path, required) - string. Sandbox ID (prefixed, e.g. `sb_...`)
- Request body: none
- Responses:
  - `200`: Session list (application/json: ListSessionsResponse)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `404`: Resource not found (application/json: ErrorResponse)

### DELETE /v1/sandboxes/{id}/sessions/{sessionId}

- Summary: Destroy a session
- Operation ID: destroySession
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Parameters:
  - `id` (path, required) - string. Sandbox ID (prefixed, e.g. `sb_...`)
  - `sessionId` (path, required) - string. Session ID (prefixed, e.g. `sess_...`)
- Request body: none
- Responses:
  - `200`: Session destroyed (application/json: OkResponse)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `404`: Resource not found (application/json: ErrorResponse)

### POST /v1/sandboxes/{id}/sessions/{sessionId}/exec

- Summary: Execute command in session
- Operation ID: sessionExec
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Parameters:
  - `id` (path, required) - string. Sandbox ID (prefixed, e.g. `sb_...`)
  - `sessionId` (path, required) - string. Session ID (prefixed, e.g. `sess_...`)
- Request body:
  - application/json: SessionExecRequest
- Responses:
  - `200`: Sync result (application/json: ExecSyncResponse)
  - `202`: Async exec accepted (application/json: ExecAsyncResponse)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `404`: Resource not found (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `409`: State conflict (application/json: ErrorResponse)

### POST /v1/sandboxes/{id}/sessions/{sessionId}/input

- Summary: Send input to session stdin
- Operation ID: sendSessionInput
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Parameters:
  - `id` (path, required) - string. Sandbox ID (prefixed, e.g. `sb_...`)
  - `sessionId` (path, required) - string. Session ID (prefixed, e.g. `sess_...`)
- Request body:
  - application/json: object
- Responses:
  - `200`: Input sent (application/json: OkResponse)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `404`: Resource not found (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `409`: State conflict (application/json: ErrorResponse)

### GET /v1/sandboxes/{id}/sessions/{sessionId}/stream

- Summary: Stream session output (SSE)
- Operation ID: streamSessionOutput
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Parameters:
  - `id` (path, required) - string. Sandbox ID (prefixed, e.g. `sb_...`)
  - `sessionId` (path, required) - string. Session ID (prefixed, e.g. `sess_...`)
  - `Last-Event-ID` (header, optional) - string. Reconnect from this event ID
- Request body: none
- Responses:
  - `200`: SSE event stream (text/event-stream: string)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `404`: Resource not found (application/json: ErrorResponse)

## Files

File upload, download, and listing

### PUT /v1/sandboxes/{id}/files

- Summary: Upload a file
- Operation ID: uploadFile
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Description: Writes the raw request body to `path`. `batch=true` only increases the size limit; it does not unpack tarballs or perform directory extraction.
- Parameters:
  - `id` (path, required) - string. Sandbox ID (prefixed, e.g. `sb_...`)
  - `path` (query, required) - string. Absolute path inside the sandbox
  - `batch` (query, optional) - boolean. Enable batch mode (10 GB limit instead of 5 GB). The payload is still written verbatim.
- Request body:
  - application/octet-stream: string (binary)
- Responses:
  - `200`: File written (application/json: object)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `404`: Resource not found (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `409`: State conflict (application/json: ErrorResponse)

### GET /v1/sandboxes/{id}/files

- Summary: Download or list files
- Operation ID: getFile
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Description: Set `list=true` to list directory contents, otherwise downloads the file at `path`.
- Parameters:
  - `id` (path, required) - string. Sandbox ID (prefixed, e.g. `sb_...`)
  - `path` (query, required) - string. Absolute path inside the sandbox
  - `list` (query, optional) - boolean. List directory instead of downloading
  - `limit` (query, optional) - integer. Items per page (directory listing)
  - `cursor` (query, optional) - string.
- Request body: none
- Responses:
  - `200`: File data or directory listing (application/octet-stream: string (binary); application/json: ListFilesResponse)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `404`: Resource not found (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `409`: State conflict (application/json: ErrorResponse)

### DELETE /v1/sandboxes/{id}/files

- Summary: Delete a file
- Operation ID: deleteFile
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Parameters:
  - `id` (path, required) - string. Sandbox ID (prefixed, e.g. `sb_...`)
  - `path` (query, required) - string. Absolute path inside the sandbox
- Request body: none
- Responses:
  - `200`: File deleted (application/json: OkResponse)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `404`: Resource not found (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `409`: State conflict (application/json: ErrorResponse)

## Artifacts

Register and retrieve build artifacts

### POST /v1/sandboxes/{id}/artifacts

- Summary: Register artifact paths
- Operation ID: registerArtifacts
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Parameters:
  - `id` (path, required) - string. Sandbox ID (prefixed, e.g. `sb_...`)
- Request body:
  - application/json: object
- Responses:
  - `200`: Artifacts registered (application/json: object)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `404`: Resource not found (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `413`: Too many artifact paths (application/json: ErrorResponse)

### GET /v1/sandboxes/{id}/artifacts

- Summary: List collected artifacts
- Operation ID: listArtifacts
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Parameters:
  - `id` (path, required) - string. Sandbox ID (prefixed, e.g. `sb_...`)
  - `cursor` (query, optional) - string.
  - `limit` (query, optional) - integer.
- Request body: none
- Responses:
  - `200`: Artifact list (application/json: ListArtifactsResponse)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `404`: Resource not found (application/json: ErrorResponse)

## Replay

Replay bundles and visibility

### GET /v1/sandboxes/{id}/replay

- Summary: Get replay bundle
- Operation ID: getReplay
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Parameters:
  - `id` (path, required) - string. Sandbox ID (prefixed, e.g. `sb_...`)
- Request body: none
- Responses:
  - `200`: Replay bundle (application/json: ReplayBundle)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `404`: Resource not found (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `410`: Replay expired (application/json: ErrorResponse)

### PATCH /v1/sandboxes/{id}/replay

- Summary: Set replay visibility
- Operation ID: setReplayVisibility
- Authentication: Bearer token in `Authorization` header
- Parameters:
  - `id` (path, required) - string. Sandbox ID (prefixed, e.g. `sb_...`)
- Request body:
  - application/json: object
- Responses:
  - `200`: Visibility updated (application/json: object)
  - `400`: Validation error (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `401`: Authentication required (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `404`: Resource not found (application/json: ErrorResponse)

### GET /v1/public/replay/{id}

- Summary: Get public replay bundle (no auth)
- Operation ID: getPublicReplay
- Authentication: None
- Parameters:
  - `id` (path, required) - string. Sandbox ID (prefixed, e.g. `sb_...`)
- Request body: none
- Responses:
  - `200`: Replay bundle (application/json: ReplayBundle)
  - `404`: Resource not found (application/json: ErrorResponse)
  - `410`: Replay expired (application/json: ErrorResponse)
